case_title: PORTILLO, EDWIN AS GUARDIAN FOR ANTHONY PORTILLO VS ENTERPRISE RENT-A-CAR et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ENTERPRISE RENT-A-CAR
PORTILLO ARE TO BE PLACED IN A BLOCKED ACCOUNT BY EDWIN PORTILLO.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT ENTERPRISE RENT-A-CAR VALASQUEZ, SIDNEY
PETITION FOR MINOR BY AND THROUGH HIS GUARDIAN AD LITEM

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PORTILLO, EDWIN  AS GUARDIAN FOR ANTHONY PORTILLO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ENTERPRISE RENT-A-CAR VALASQUEZ, SIDNEY $500.00 PRINCIPAL, $55.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $555.00, SIDNEY VELASQUEZ IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE-NO PROOF OF SERVICE. PROCEEDS IN FAVOR OF ANTHONY STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY PORTILLO, EDWIN  AS GUARDIAN FOR ANTHONY PORTILLO AS TO DEFENDANT ENTERPRISE RENT-A-CAR VALASQUEZ, SIDNEY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-28-2000 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
